nasb.text: and one cake of bread and one cake of bread mixed with oil and one wafer from the basket of unleavened bread which is set before the Lord;

esv.text: and one loaf of bread and one cake of bread made with oil, and one wafer out of the basket of unleavened bread that is before the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要從擺在耶和華面前載無酵餅的籃子裡取一個圓餅、一個油餅和一個薄餅。

ccb.text: 再从耶和华面前的篮子里取一个无酵饼、一个调油的无酵饼和一个薄饼。
